goal: Re-review after addressing all four review findings (BLOCKING, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)
scope: Phase 6 re-review — verify fixes for false-positive guard, dead code removal, AC5 deferral, and clean working tree
acceptance_criteria: BLOCKING: working tree is clean (git status --short shows no uncommitted changes to committed files)
HIGH: isCoveredByScript() ancestor matching requires copy-command context — echo/log lines rejected
MEDIUM: review-process.md defers to codex-rules.md for Codex-specific guidance
LOW: per-file cp lines removed from init.sh/upgrade.sh — no dead code to confuse maintainers
